rabbits_foot.name: rabbits_foot
rabbits_foot.description: A small rabbit's foot. You feel a bit luckier. +1 Damage.

ring_of_protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring_of_protection.description: A simple gold band that hums with protective energy. +1 AC, +1 Spell Resist.

cloak_of_protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak_of_protection.description: A heavy velvet cloak that seems to turn away blades. +2 AC, +2 Spell Resist.

belt_of_ogre_strength.name: Belt of Ogre Strength
belt_of_ogre_strength.description: A giant leather belt that infuses you with raw power. +3 Damage.

belt_of_giant_strength.name: Belt of Giant Strength
belt_of_giant_strength.description: A belt made from the hide of a Hill Giant. Immense power! +5 Damage.

bracers_of_defense.name: Bracers of Defense
bracers_of_defense.description: Magical bracers that create a shimmering field of force. +2 AC, +2 Spell Resist, +2 Damage Resist.

ring_of_health.name: Ring of Health
ring_of_health.description: A pulsating red gem that invigorates the wearer. +20 Max HP.

amulet_of_health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet_of_health.description: A radiant artifact that vastly increases vitality. +25 Max HP.

mana_crystal.name: Mana Crystal
mana_crystal.description: A shard of pure magical energy. Improves spell success.

spell_book.name: Spell Book
spell_book.description: A shard of pure magical energy. Improves spell success.

archmage_crystal.name: Archmage Crystal
archmage_crystal.description: A dense cluster of mana crystals. Significantly improves spell success.

training_belt.name: Training Belt
training_belt.description: A training belt imbued with special properties. +1 to hit and damage, +2 Max Stamina and +5 Max HP.

hero_belt.name: Hero Belt
hero_belt.description: The belt of a legendary champion. +2 to hit and damage, +4 Max Stamina and +20 Max HP.

Amulet_of_the_warmage.name: Amulet of the Warmage
Amulet_of_the_warmage.description: An amulet favored by battle-mages. Greatly improves spell success, +3 Spell DC, resistance & attack rolls, and +5 Max MP.
